posts.title: Western Australian family winery, Castelli Estate joins the Oatley Fine Wine Merchants Portfolio
posts.excerpt: Castelli Estates, one of the fastest-rising Western Australian boutique wine brands, will join Oatley Fine Wine Merchants (OFWM) for distribution of their wine portfolio. Castelli Estate is a forward-thinking and innovative winery based in the scenic Great Southern coastal town of Denmark. posts.title: Renowned Adelaide Hills winery, Wicks Estate, joins the Oatley Fine Wine Merchants Portfolio
posts.excerpt: One of the Adelaide Hills’ most recognised wineries, Wicks Estate, will join Oatley Fine Wine Merchants for national distribution of their wine portfolio from 1 July 2021. posts.title: Best's Great Western joins the Oatley Fine Wine Merchants Portfolio
posts.excerpt: One of Australia’s most esteemed wineries, Best’s Great Western, will join Oatley Fine Wine Merchants (OFWM) for national distribution of their wine portfolio from June 17th, 2021. posts.title: International sparkling stars, Henkell & Mionetto, join the Oatley Fine Wine Merchants Portfolio
posts.excerpt: One of Australia’s favourite imported sparkling wines, Henkell, is joining the Oatley Fine Wine Merchants’ (OFWM) portfolio from 13th May, 2020. posts.title: Four in Hand wins 2017 Great Australian Shiraz Challenge

posts.title: Mudgee Wine Show 2016 results confirm the Oatley's belief in chardonnay and shiraz
